name: Cheesy Franks-n-Beans Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 slices processed American cheese, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, brown sugar, Dijon-style mustard, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl and mix well.
2. Slice the frankfurters lengthwise and arrange 4 strips of cheese in each serving dish.
3. Pour half of the bean mixture into a 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
4. Arrange 4 frankfurters on top of the beans.
5. Place 3 slices of bacon between the frankfurters.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining ingredients.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, or arrange in a crockpot and heat on low for 8 hours.
